description_long: This object consists of a neatly stacked pile of books, with two smaller books or possibly notebooks placed on top of a larger, rectangular base book. The books have sharp, clean edges and a uniform, dark color, suggesting hardcovers or thick, matte-finished covers. The stack is slightly irregular, with some books offset and a ribbon or bookmark protruding from one of the books. The surfaces appear smooth and flat, with no visible text or illustration on the covers. The overall form is compact and blocky, with the books closely aligned. The object gives the impression of a modern, minimalistic set of books, possibly intended for decorative or practical use in an urban environment.
description: A stack of dark, hardcovered books with clean lines and a protruding ribbon bookmark, arranged in a compact, minimalistic pile.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stacked books with the top two books clearly visible and a ribbon bookmark protruding from the left side.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the layered arrangement and the offset alignment of the books, with the top book's edge most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the stacked nature and the ribbon extending from the right, with the books' edges forming a stepped pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the ribbon bookmark hanging down and the books' covers aligned vertically.
